title: China digital radio (CDR)
short description: Convergent Digital Radio (CDR) or China Digital Radio is an in-band-on-channel (IBOC) digital radio broadcasting format used in China. It can be found in multiple bandwidth configurations with different modulation formats.
description: Convergent Digital Radio (CDR), also known as China Digital Radio (CDR), is an In-Band On-Channel (IBOC) digital radio broadcasting standard that operates in the FM band (88 MHz to 108 MHz). It is also known as ITU Digital System H.
